name: Betsumon

signature_move.name: Tsukkomi Punch
signature_move.description: Mentally drains the opponent with a punch with only the power of a straight man's interjections.

description: An eccentric Digimon that impersonates all sorts of Digimon in order to confuse the enemy. While it is a Puppet Digimon, similarly to Etemon and Monzaemon , it is a rare type capable of disguising itself as various types of Digimon by changing the Digimon Suit (?) it wears. Its Special Moves are " Tsukkomi Punch ", which despite only having the power of a straight man's interjections has the ability to mentally drain the opponent, and " Cold Gag ", an attack which utilises its dubious gaze and cryptic gags to stop opponents in their tracks, as if they have been frozen.
